name: @fabric/core
description: Fabric reference client — P2P messaging, identity, Bitcoin/Lightning services (v0.1.0-RC).

scripts.build:book: npm run make:book && npm run tidy
scripts.ci: npm run smoke && npm run lint:types && npm run lint:pkg && npm test
scripts.smoke: node -e "require('./types/fabric'); require('./types/distributedExecution'); require('./types/message'); require('./types/peer'); require('./types/hash256'); require('./functions/bytes'); require('./functions/fabricCanonicalJson'); require('./functions/wireJson'); require('./functions/fabricNativeAccel'); console.log('smoke ok');"
scripts.lint:pkg: eslint scripts/fabric.js scripts/cli.js scripts/gen-quality-reports.js scripts/check-book-links.js scripts/coverage-baseline.js scripts/clean-jsdoc-html.js scripts/classtree.js scripts/report-noble-hashes.js scripts/fix-wif-bs58check-noble.js scripts/benchmark-lib.js scripts/benchmark-report.js functions/bytes.js functions/fabricCanonicalJson.js functions/wireJson.js functions/fabricNativeAccel.js functions/base58.js functions/bech32.js functions/sipa/bech32.js functions/sipa/segwit_addr.js functions/bip39.js functions/bip32.js
scripts.report:coverage-baseline: c8 -o coverage --reporter=json-summary --reporter=text-summary npm test && node scripts/coverage-baseline.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && rm -rf stores/wiki && git clone git@github.com:FabricLabs/wiki.git stores/wiki && rm -rf stores/wiki/.git && cp -rf stores/wiki/assets assets/wiki && http-server
scripts.docs: npm run make:api && npm run make:docs && http-server -p 8000 docs
scripts.make:all: npm run make:service && npm run make:app && npm run make:lib && npm run make:dev # && npm run make:binary
scripts.make:api: NODE_OPTIONS="--require ./scripts/bigint-json.js" jsdoc2md --configure jsdoc.json --files $(node scripts/list-jsdoc-type-files.js) schemata/*.js services/*.js settings/deprecations.js README.md > API.md
scripts.make:app: ### ERROR: Not yet implemented.  Debug: `examples/app.js` to `assets/app.js`
scripts.make:coverage: npm run coverage && c8 report --reporter html
scripts.make:dev: npm run make:examples && npm run make:docs && npm run make:book && cp -rf docs _book/ && cp -rf examples _book/ && js-beautify --indent-size 2 -r _book/**.html
scripts.make:docs: npm run make:api && node scripts/clean-jsdoc-html.js && node_modules/.bin/jsdoc -c jsdoc.json services/**.js $(node scripts/list-jsdoc-type-files.js --recursive) settings/deprecations.js DEVELOPERS.md -d docs/ && js-beautify --indent-size 2 -r docs/**.html
scripts.make:lib: ### ERROR: Not yet implemented.  Debug: `scripts/fabric.js` to `assets/fabric.min.js`
scripts.make:service: ### ERROR: Not yet implemented.  Debug: ` examples/service.js` to `assets/service.js`
scripts.make:viewer: ### ERROR: Not yet implemented.  Debug: `components/circuit-viewer.js` to `assets/viewer.min.js`
scripts.report:coverage: npm run make:coverage && c8 report --reporter=text-lcov > reports/coverage.lcov
scripts.report:install:
rm -rf node_modules && echo "
" > package-lock.json && echo "$ npm i" > reports/install.log && npm i >> reports/install.log
scripts.reports: npm run report:install && npm run make:coverage && npm run report:todo
scripts.review:todo:
npm run report:todo && cat reports/TODO.txt && echo '
Outstanding TODO items (@fabric/core):' && wc -l reports/TODO.txt && echo '
Issues List: https://github.com/FabricLabs/fabric/issues
Disclosures: security@fabric.pub

'
scripts.test:app: npm run make:service && npm run make:app && NODE_ENV=test mocha tests/fabric.app.js
scripts.watch:book: honkit serve --port 8000 # NOTE: /docs and /examples may not be available.

author: Fabric Labs
